description: Hub-native framework health check — Phase 0 of the v4.4 Skill Internal Lifecycle. Runs at random intervals to verify cache, shared layer, routing, and adapter integrity. Alert if score drops below 90%.

checks.name: Cache Entry Staleness
checks.description: Verify invalidated_by SHA256 hashes still match source files. Stale entries = cache is lying.
checks.implementation: For each L1/L2/L3 cache entry with invalidated_by hashes, compute current SHA256 of source file. Mismatch = stale. Score = non-stale / total.

checks.name: Cache Hit Accuracy
checks.description: When a cache hit is used, did the skill output match expectations? Track hit_count vs correction_count.
checks.implementation: Per cache entry: accuracy = 1 - (correction_count / hit_count). If no hits, score = 1.0. Overall = average across all entries with hits.

checks.name: Shared Layer Cross-Reference
checks.description: Spot-check 3 random fields across shared layer JSON files for internal consistency.
checks.implementation: Pick 3 random cross-references: (1) feature-registry.json status vs state.json current_phase, (2) metric-status.json instrumented flag vs analytics-taxonomy.csv, (3) design-system.json token count vs AppTheme.swift. Score = consistent / 3.

checks.name: Skill Routing Integrity
checks.description: Verify skill-routing.json task types map to existing SKILL.md files and cache directories.
checks.implementation: For each task type in routing_rules, verify: (a) assigned skill has .claude/skills/{skill}/SKILL.md, (b) skill has .claude/cache/{skill}/ dir. Score = valid / total.

checks.name: Adapter Layer Health
checks.description: Check that each adapter dir has adapter.md + schema.json + mapping.json.
checks.implementation: For each dir in .claude/integrations/ (excluding _template/), verify 3 files exist. Score = complete / total.

alert_levels.warning: 0.90 - 0.95 — log + advisory to user, continue execution
alert_levels.critical: < 0.90 — log + STOP + alert with failing checks

options: rollback_cache — reset to last known-good history entry (score >= 0.95)
rollback.after_resolution: Re-run health check to verify fix
